Reducing your calorie intake allows your body to burn its internal fuel reserves, which are the fats you aim to get rid of. Essentially, half a pound of fat is roughly equivalent to 3500 calories. This means that to lose half a pound a week, you need to burn 500 calories more than you consume each day. Losing half a pound a week is considered a healthy weight loss range. While trying to reduce calorie intake, it is important to choose low-calorie but nutrient-dense foods like vegetables, fruits, and lean proteins, and to pay attention to every calorie you consume. english_translation: If an ingrown toenail is infected or does not improve after 5 days, you may need to see a doctor. The doctor can treat the ingrown toenail with topical antibiotics. If there is a deep infection in the finger, you may be prescribed oral antibiotics. If the ingrown toenail is due to a fungus (which often occurs when this condition recurs), the doctor can identify this cause and provide treatment. You need to inform the doctor if: the pain around the nail worsens, or if redness and tenderness spread, or if you cannot bend your finger at any joint, or if you have a fever. These symptoms indicate that there may be a more serious problem. In cases of ingrown toenails without pus, the doctor may proceed to lift the nail.

english_translation: Practicing tongue twisters is a great way to help you speak more fluently because when you can say these phrases fluently, you will learn how to keep your voice clear and confident. Many actors and speakers often practice tongue twisters to warm up their voices before stepping on stage. Start by speaking very slowly and gradually increase your speed until you can say these phrases at a normal speaking rate. When practicing tongue twisters, make sure to emphasize each word so that your tongue, jaw, and lips are actively working. Once you are comfortable speaking them, try to raise your pitch and emphasize more. Doing this will not only help improve your speaking skills but also strengthen your mouth muscles. You should try practicing some of the tongue twisters below to speak more clearly: "Buổi trưa ăn bưởi chua" (Repeat).
